SEARCH
Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit

Class BukkitMagicUtilsConsumerRegistry

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.platform.bukkit.BukkitMagicUtilsConsumerRegistry
public final class BukkitMagicUtilsConsumerRegistry extends Object
Tracks Bukkit/Paper plugins that are currently using the shared MagicUtils runtime.

    static final record 
    BukkitMagicUtilsConsumerRegistry.ConsumerInfo
    Immutable snapshot of a shared-runtime consumer.

  • Method Details

    • register

      public static void register(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.bootstrap.MagicRuntime runtime, @Nullable @Nullable CommandRegistry commandRegistry)
      Registers or refreshes a plugin using the shared MagicUtils runtime.
      Parameters:
      plugin - plugin instance
      runtime - runtime container
      commandRegistry - command registry when commands are enabled

    • unregister

      public static void unregister(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Removes a plugin from the shared runtime registry.
      Parameters:
      plugin - plugin instance

    • consumerInfo

      public static BukkitMagicUtilsConsumerRegistry.ConsumerInfo consumerInfo(org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin, Map<String,Object> payload)
      Rebuilds an immutable consumer snapshot from a bridge payload.
      Parameters:
      plugin - plugin instance
      payload - registry payload emitted by the consumer runtime
      Returns:
      immutable consumer info
